description: Commands/conditionals shared by EVERY agent, inherited from C4BaseAgentDriver / C4BaseDriver / CmdDispatcher / CondDispatcher base classes. Confirmed by tracing control4_agent_notification.c4w's GetCreationFunc -> constructor chain; the base-class constructor registers these regardless of the specific agent.

base_commands.name: GET_LAST_ACTION
base_commands.notes: diagnostic: last action taken by the agent

base_commands.name: GET_CAPABILITIES
base_commands.notes: enumerates what this agent instance supports

significance: Every one of the ~39 agents gets these for free without needing per-agent extraction. If GET_CAPABILITIES/GET_COMMAND_INFO are themselves queryable at runtime against a live agent instance, they may be a MUCH better vocab-discovery mechanism than static disassembly -- worth testing against a virtual director in a future session (send GET_CAPABILITIES / GET_COMMAND_INFO to an agent and see what comes back).
